xgraphics Math Functions

The math library provided by the xgraphics utility library supplies functions to compute both basic and complicated 3D mathematical operations.

The 3D math application functions can be organized into the following groups.

Color XGColorAdd
  XGColorAdjustContrast
  XGColorAdjustSaturation
  XGColorLerp
  XGColorModulate
  XGColorNegative
  XGColorScale
  XGColorSubtract
Creation D3DXCreateMatrixStack
Plane XGPlaneDot
  XGPlaneDotCoord
  XGPlaneDotNormal
  XGPlaneIntersectLine
  XGPlaneFromPointNormal
  XGPlaneNormalize
  XGPlaneFromPoints
  XGPlaneTransform
Quaternion XGQuaternionBaryCentric
  XGQuaternionConjugate
  XGQuaternionDot
  XGQuaternionExp
  XGQuaternionIdentity
  XGQuaternionInverse
  XGQuaternionIsIdentity
  XGQuaternionLength
  XGQuaternionLengthSq
  XGQuaternionLn
  XGQuaternionMultiply
  XGQuaternionNormalize
  XGQuaternionRotationAxis
  XGQuaternionRotationMatrix
  XGQuaternionRotationYawPitchRoll
  XGQuaternionSlerp
  XGQuaternionSquad
  XGQuaternionToAxisAngle
2D Vector XGVec2Add
  XGVec2BaryCentric
  XGVec2CatmullRom
  XGVec2CCW
  XGVec2Dot
  XGVec2Hermite
  XGVec2Length
  XGVec2LengthSq
  XGVec2Lerp
  XGVec2Maximize
  XGVec2Minimize
  XGVec2Normalize
  XGVec2Scale
  XGVec2Subtract
  XGVec2Transform
  XGVec2TransformCoord
  XGVec2TransformNormal
3D Vector XGVec3Add
  XGVec3BaryCentric
  XGVec3CatmullRom
  XGVec3Cross
  XGVec3Dot
  XGVec3Hermite
  XGVec3Length
  XGVec3LengthSq
  XGVec3Lerp
  XGVec3Maximize
  XGVec3Minimize
  XGVec3Normalize
  XGVec3Project
  XGVec3Scale
  XGVec3Subtract
  XGVec3Transform
  XGVec3TransformCoord
  XGVec3TransformNormal
  XGVec3Unproject
4-D Matrix XGMatrixAffineTransformation
  XGMatrixfDeterminant
  XGMatrixIdentity
  XGMatrixInverse
  XGMatrixIsIdentity
  XGMatrixLookAtRH
  XGMatrixLookAtLH
  XGMatrixMultiply
  XGMatrixOrthoRH
  XGMatrixOrthoLH
  XGMatrixOrthoOffCenterRH
  XGMatrixOrthoOffCenterLH
  XGMatrixPerspectiveRH
  XGMatrixPerspectiveLH
  XGMatrixPerspectiveFovRH
  XGMatrixPerspectiveFovLH
  XGMatrixPerspectiveOffCenterRH
  XGMatrixPerspectiveOffCenterLH
  XGMatrixReflect
  XGMatrixRotationAxis
  XGMatrixRotationQuaternion
  XGMatrixRotationX
  XGMatrixRotationY
  XGMatrixRotationYawPitchRoll
  XGMatrixRotationZ
  XGMatrixScaling
  XGMatrixShadow
  XGMatrixTransformation
  XGMatrixTranslation
  XGMatrixTranspose
4-D Vector XGVec4Add
  XGVec4BaryCentric
  XGVec4CatmullRom
  XGVec4Cross
  XGVec4Dot
  XGVec4Hermite
  XGVec4Length
  XGVec4LengthSq
  XGVec4Lerp
  XGVec4Maximize
  XGVec4Minimize
  XGVec4Normalize
  XGVec4Scale
  XGVec4Subtract
  XGVec4Transform

Note  All the math functions can take the same object as the passed [in] and returned [out] parameters. Also, out parameters are typically returned as return values, so that the output of one math function may be used as a parameter for another math function.

Unpublished work. © 2000 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
